candidate.completion: send a plus-one so I can stop telling restaurants my phone is my date.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please send a plus-one so I can stop telling restaurants my phone is my date.

evaluation.rationale: The plus-one/phone-as-date image is specific and recognizably human, with a real comic pivot from loneliness into social performance. But the reversal is more situational than incisive, and the line runs a bit long to land as sharp, finished classic wit.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
